_note: Country + Team IQ profiles for teams playing in each host city. Update star players and FIFA rankings as tournament approaches.

seattle.name: Belgium

jersey.description: Bold red inspired by Gothic stained-glass windows — Red Devils and Red Flames icons woven in (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Egypt — Jun 15, noon PT, Lumen Field (Group G)

country.location: Landlocked between France, Germany, Netherlands, and Luxembourg. 5,100 miles from Seattle.
funFacts: Belgium invented the modern french fry — not France
Home to the HQ of both NATO and the European Union
Has more Michelin-starred restaurants per capita than any European country
Produces 220,000 tons of chocolate per year
Holds the world record for the most varieties of beer

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Kevin De Bruyne
starPlayers.note: One of the best midfielders in history. 2026 may be his last WC. Creates everything for Belgium.

starPlayers.name: Romelu Lukaku
starPlayers.note: Belgium's all-time top scorer. Physical, powerful, best in box. Fitness is always the question.

starPlayers.name: Lois Openda
starPlayers.note: The next generation of Belgian attack. Fast, clinical, hungry for big moments.

team.style: Possession-based with elite individual quality. De Bruyne dictates tempo. Strong on transitions and set pieces.
team.watchFor: De Bruyne against Egypt. If he's on, Belgium should control the match. If he's off — Egypt's counter-attack becomes dangerous.
team.seattleContext: Belgium's opener vs Egypt on June 15 at noon is the first World Cup match in Lumen Field's history.

seattle.name: Egypt

jersey.description: Deep red gradient with gold and black accents — angular motifs echo hieroglyphics (Puma)

cityMatches: vs Belgium — Jun 15, noon PT, Lumen Field (Group G)
vs Iran — Jun 26, 8pm PT, Lumen Field (Group G)

country.location: Northeastern corner of Africa, bridging Africa and the Middle East via the Sinai Peninsula. 7,400 miles from Seattle.
funFacts: Home to the Great Pyramids — the last surviving Wonder of the Ancient World
The Nile River (world's longest) runs through Egypt for 900 miles
Egypt is the most populous Arab country in the world
Ancient Egyptian civilization is over 5,000 years old
Alexandria was once the world's largest city under Alexander the Great

team.lastWC: 2018 Russia — group stage exit (Salah played despite injury from CL final)

starPlayers.name: Mohamed Salah
starPlayers.note: One of the greatest players of his generation. At 34, this is likely his final World Cup. Everything Egypt does runs through him.

starPlayers.name: Omar Marmoush
starPlayers.note: Breakout star of European football. Fast, two-footed, elite pressing. Egypt's next generation superstar.

starPlayers.name: Mostafa Mohamed
starPlayers.note: Physical center forward who leads the line. Lethal in the box when Salah creates space.

team.style: Disciplined defensive block. Counter-attack through Salah and Marmoush. Dangerous on set pieces.
team.watchFor: Salah's opening match at Lumen Field vs Belgium. He described this World Cup as the one that defines his legacy.
team.seattleContext: Egypt plays in Seattle twice — vs Belgium June 15 (noon) and vs Iran June 26 (8pm). The nighttime Egypt vs Iran match is one of the most anticipated fixtures of the entire tournament.

seattle.name: Iran

jersey.description: White body with tonal animal spot pattern on sleeves — Iranian flag colors trim the cuffs (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Egypt — Jun 26, 8pm PT, Lumen Field (Group G)

country.location: Southwestern Asia, bordered by Turkey, Iraq, the Caspian Sea, Afghanistan, and Pakistan. 7,700 miles from Seattle.
funFacts: Iran is home to one of the world's oldest civilizations — ancient Persia dates back 3,000+ years
Tehran sits at 3,800 feet elevation — one of the highest capital cities in the world
Iran has 26 UNESCO World Heritage Sites including Persepolis, built in 520 BC
The Persian Empire was the world's first superpower
Iran produces more saffron than any other country (90% of global supply)

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (drew with USA 0-0, beat Wales 2-0)

starPlayers.name: Mehdi Taremi
starPlayers.note: Iran's greatest modern player. Clinical finisher, smart movement, Champions League quality.

starPlayers.name: Sardar Azmoun
starPlayers.note: 'The Iranian Messi' — gifted technician. When motivated, world-class. Fitness and desire questioned.

starPlayers.name: Alireza Beiranvand
starPlayers.note: World-class shot-stopper. Will be essential in holding Egypt to a draw if needed.

team.style: Defensively disciplined, physical, organized. Counter-attack through Taremi. Set-piece threats.
team.watchFor: Taremi vs Egypt's defense in Seattle's late-night Group G clash on June 26. With high stakes for both teams, this match carries enormous tension.
team.seattleContext: Iran vs Egypt at 8pm on a Friday night is the most geopolitically charged match of Seattle's World Cup. Sold out. Maximum security.

seattle.name: USA

jersey.description: White with wavy stripe pattern flowing across the jersey — stars subtly integrated into the fabric (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Australia — Jun 19, noon PT, Lumen Field (Group D)

country.location: Seattle's HOME. 6th-largest country by area, spanning from Atlantic to Pacific oceans.
funFacts: Co-host of the 2026 World Cup alongside Canada and Mexico
The US Women's National Team is the most successful in history (4 World Cups)
Yellowstone National Park — the world's first national park — was founded here in 1872
The United States has the world's largest economy by nominal GDP
Seattle is home to Amazon, Microsoft, Boeing, and Starbucks

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — Round of 16 (lost to Netherlands 3-1)

starPlayers.name: Christian Pulisic
starPlayers.note: Captain America. The face of US soccer's golden generation. Strong, skillful, clutch in big moments.

starPlayers.name: Gio Reyna
starPlayers.note: The most technically gifted American of his generation. When fit and firing, changes games completely.

starPlayers.name: Yunus Musah
starPlayers.note: Engine of the US midfield. Italian-born American who brings elite European quality to every match.

team.style: High-energy, high-pressing, physical. Transition football at speed. Set-piece threats.
weaknesses: Set pieces as a weakness as well as strength
team.watchFor: Pulisic in front of a home crowd at Lumen Field. The USMNT playing in Seattle is the domestic World Cup moment Seattle has been waiting for.
team.seattleContext: USA vs Australia June 19 at noon PT. The largest American soccer crowd Seattle has ever seen. USMNT on home soil.

seattle.name: Australia

jersey.description: Yellow and green inspired by the beloved 2006 Socceroos kit — gradient green shorts complete the look (Nike)

cityMatches: vs USA — Jun 19, noon PT, Lumen Field (Group D)

country.location: Southern hemisphere, entirely surrounded by ocean. The only country that is also a continent. 7,700 miles from Seattle.
funFacts: Australia is the only country on Earth that is also a continent
Home to 21 of the 25 most venomous snake species in the world
The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest living structure — visible from space
Australia has more species of kangaroo than any other mammal
Canberra was purpose-built as the capital after Sydney and Melbourne couldn't agree who should be

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — Round of 16 (lost to Argentina 2-1)

starPlayers.name: Mathew Ryan
starPlayers.note: World-class shot-stopper. The heartbeat of the Australian backline. Essential for any deep run.

starPlayers.name: Jackson Irvine
starPlayers.note: Captain. Engine, leader, box-to-box quality. Sets the intensity for the whole team.

starPlayers.name: Martin Boyle
starPlayers.note: Electric pace and directness on the wing. Can beat anyone with speed on his day.

team.style: Organized, physical, set-piece oriented. Counter-attack on transitions. Hard to beat.
weaknesses: Technical quality gaps vs elite nations
team.watchFor: Australia knows how to beat co-host favorites — they upset Denmark and France in 2022. Don't sleep on the Socceroos vs USA.
team.seattleContext: Australia plays in Seattle because of their Pacific connection — the closest World Cup venue to Australia's timezone.

seattle.name: Bosnia-Herzegovina

jersey.description: Royal blue with yellow diagonal stripe — Bosnia's first World Cup kit in 12 years (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Qatar — Jun 24, noon PT, Lumen Field (Group B)

country.location: Western Balkans, bordered by Croatia, Serbia, and Montenegro. Small landlocked nation with a narrow access to the Adriatic. 5,600 miles from Seattle.
funFacts: Sarajevo hosted the 1984 Winter Olympics
The assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand in Sarajevo in 1914 triggered World War I
Bosnia-Herzegovina has three presidents simultaneously — one for each major ethnic group
The Stari Most (Old Bridge) in Mostar is a UNESCO World Heritage Site rebuilt after destruction in the 1990s war
Has the largest Bosnian diaspora community of any US city in Seattle, WA

team.lastWC: 2014 Brazil — group stage (beat Iran 3-1 but eliminated)

starPlayers.name: Ermedin Demirović
starPlayers.note: Bundesliga sensation. Clinical finisher, physical, relentless. Bosnia's most dangerous attacker.

starPlayers.name: Sehad Hajradinović
starPlayers.note: Creative force. Technical and dangerous in final third.

starPlayers.name: Nikola Bilbija
starPlayers.note: Experienced domestic striker who provides a focal point for attack.

team.style: Physical, direct, set-piece focused. Long ball to Demirović. Compact defensive shape.
strengths: Emotional motivation — first WC in 12 years
weaknesses: Qatar is a manageable opponent but Belgium and Canada are difficult
team.watchFor: Bosnia's historic match at Lumen Field June 24 — their first World Cup appearance since 2014. Seattle has a significant Bosnian diaspora who will be in the stands.
team.seattleContext: Bosnia-Herzegovina vs Qatar at noon on June 24 is a rare, accessible group stage match. Seattle's Bosnian community makes this uniquely local.

seattle.name: Qatar

jersey.description: Maroon with darker serrated lines honoring the national flag's zig-zag division (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Bosnia-Herzegovina — Jun 24, noon PT, Lumen Field (Group B)

country.location: Small peninsula jutting into the Persian Gulf from the Arabian Peninsula. One of the smallest countries in the world. 8,500 miles from Seattle.
funFacts: Qatar has the highest GDP per capita in the world
Qatar hosted the 2022 FIFA World Cup — the first ever in the Middle East
90% of Qatar's workforce are foreign nationals from South Asia and Southeast Asia
Qatar's natural gas reserves are the third largest in the world
Doha has grown from a fishing village in the 1970s to a global metropolis today

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (0 points as host nation, historic poor performance)

starPlayers.name: Akram Afif
starPlayers.note: Qatar's best player. Technically gifted, two-footed. Won AFC Player of the Year. Best in Asian football.

starPlayers.name: Almoez Ali
starPlayers.note: Scored 9 goals in 2019 Asian Cup — a tournament record. Physical and direct striker.

starPlayers.name: Hassan Al-Haydos
starPlayers.note: Veteran captain. Experienced and creative. The soul of Qatar's national team.

team.style: Technical, possession-oriented. Relies on domestic league talent. Limited physical intensity vs top European sides.
team.watchFor: Whether Qatar can finally get a point or win at a World Cup after going 0-for-7 in 2022.
team.seattleContext: Qatar vs Bosnia-Herzegovina is Group B's most evenly matched fixture — both fighting to avoid last place. A genuine contest.

kansascity.name: Argentina

jersey.description: Sky blue and white stripes with three-tone fade honouring Argentina's three World Cup wins (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Algeria — Jun 16, 8pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group J)

country.location: Southern tip of South America, stretching from the tropics to Patagonia and Antarctica. 7,200 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: Argentina has produced more Ballon d'Or winners (8) than any other country
Buenos Aires is South America's most European-feeling capital, known as the 'Paris of South America'
Argentina is the world's leading producer of yerba maté tea
The country has the highest beef consumption per capita on earth
Patagonia covers 400,000 square miles of glaciers, mountains, and steppes

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — CHAMPIONS (beat France on penalties in the final)

starPlayers.name: Lionel Messi
starPlayers.note: The greatest player in history. At 38, this is almost certainly his final World Cup. Winner of 8 Ballons d'Or and the 2022 World Cup. Every match is a farewell tour.

starPlayers.name: Julián Álvarez
starPlayers.note: 2022 World Cup hero. 4 goals at Qatar. The perfect strike partner for Messi — relentless pressing, clinical finishing.

starPlayers.name: Rodrigo De Paul
starPlayers.note: The heartbeat of Argentina's midfield. Box-to-box quality, fights for every ball, Messi's protector.

team.style: Elite possession and transition. Everything channeled through Messi. Álvarez and Enzo Fernández the engines. Tight defensive shape.
weaknesses: Messi at 38 — how many minutes can he play?
team.watchFor: Messi's opener at Arrowhead Stadium vs Algeria on June 16. One of the last times on earth you'll watch Messi play a competitive international match.
team.kcContext: Argentina vs Algeria is Kansas City's opening Group J match — and the most anticipated non-US match of the entire KC schedule.

kansascity.name: Algeria

jersey.description: White with iconic green diagonal sash — one of the most distinctive designs in African football (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Argentina — Jun 16, 8pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group J)
vs Austria — Jun 27, 9pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group J)

country.location: Largest country in Africa by area. The Sahara Desert covers 90% of the land. Borders the Mediterranean, Morocco, Tunisia, Libya, Niger, Mali, and Mauritania. 6,200 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: Algeria is the largest country in Africa and the Arab world
The Sahara Desert — the world's largest hot desert — covers most of Algeria
Algeria has ancient Roman ruins including Timgad, a UNESCO World Heritage Site
The country gained independence from France in 1962 after a brutal 8-year war
Algeria is one of the world's top 10 natural gas producers

team.wcBestFinish: Round of 16 (2014 Brazil — extra time vs Germany)
team.lastWC: 2014 Brazil — R16 (took Germany to extra time before losing 2-1)

starPlayers.name: Mohamed Benrahma
starPlayers.note: Algeria's creative force. Technical, tricky, dangerous on the ball in tight spaces. Ligue 1 quality.

starPlayers.name: Youcef Atal
starPlayers.note: Attacking full-back with pace and directness. Algeria's right flank is their most dangerous outlet.

starPlayers.name: Baghdad Bounedjah
starPlayers.note: Scored the winning goal in the 2019 AFCON final vs Senegal in 22 seconds. Clinical and smart.

team.style: Compact defensively. Counter-attack at pace through wide players. Physical and difficult to break down.
team.watchFor: Algeria defending against Messi at Arrowhead. Their 2014 performance vs Germany showed they can frustrate anyone. Can they do it again to the defending champions?
team.kcContext: Algeria plays in KC twice — opening vs Argentina (Group J) and vs Austria June 27. Two must-see Group J matches at Arrowhead.

kansascity.name: Austria

jersey.description: Bold red with deep black sleeves — fluid topographic linework mapping Austria's mountainous terrain (Puma)

cityMatches: vs Algeria — Jun 27, 9pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group J)

country.location: Landlocked in the heart of Europe, bordering Germany, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, Slovenia, Italy, Switzerland, and Liechtenstein. 5,300 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: Vienna is consistently ranked as the world's most livable city
Austria was the birthplace of Mozart, Beethoven, Schubert, Strauss, and Freud
The Habsburg Empire ruled much of Europe for 600 years from Vienna
Austria produces some of the world's finest white wines (Grüner Veltliner, Riesling)
Arnold Schwarzenegger was born in Thal, a small village in Styria, Austria

team.lastWC: Did not qualify 2018/2022

starPlayers.name: David Alaba
starPlayers.note: Austria's greatest modern player. Champions League winner. Versatile, reads the game at elite level.

starPlayers.name: Marcel Sabitzer
starPlayers.note: Dynamic box-to-box midfielder with a powerful shot. Sets the tempo for Austria's press.

starPlayers.name: Christoph Baumgartner
starPlayers.note: Creative and technically gifted. Austria's best chance creator behind Alaba.

team.style: High-pressing, Rangnick's signature gegenpressing system. Technical and organized. Demand for relentless running.
strengths: Rangnick's tactical system proven at elite level
weaknesses: Long absence from World Cups (2018 and 2022 missed)
Group J is extremely difficult with Argentina and Algeria
team.watchFor: Austria vs Algeria is a must-win for both teams. The winner likely advances. Alaba vs the Algeria attack at Arrowhead under the lights at 9pm.
team.kcContext: Austria vs Algeria is Group J's final deciding match. With Argentina likely already through, second place is a straight fight between these two.

kansascity.name: Ecuador

jersey.description: Bright yellow with navy trim — La Tri's vibrant traditional identity (Marathon)

cityMatches: vs Curaçao — Jun 20, 7pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group E)

country.location: The equator runs through Ecuador — its name literally means 'equator.' Sits on the Pacific coast of South America, below Colombia and above Peru. 3,800 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: 'Ecuador' literally means equator in Spanish — it sits right on the line
The Galapagos Islands, where Darwin developed his theory of evolution, belong to Ecuador
Ecuador is the world's top exporter of bananas
Quito (elevation 9,350 ft) is the second-highest capital city in the world
Ecuador uniquely uses the US Dollar as its official currency, adopted in 2000 after economic crisis

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (4 points, narrowly eliminated)

starPlayers.name: Gonzalo Plata
starPlayers.note: Devastating pace and directness. Ecuador's most dangerous player in transition. Tough to contain.

starPlayers.name: Moisés Caicedo
starPlayers.note: One of the best defensive midfielders in the Premier League. Controls tempo, wins every duel.

starPlayers.name: Kendry Páez
starPlayers.note: Teenage sensation — signed by Chelsea at 16. Technical, creative, the future of Ecuadorian football.

team.style: Physical and hard-working. Strong defensive foundation. Counter-attack through Plata and wingbacks.
weaknesses: Rely on counter-attack vs organized defenses
Curaçao match is a trap game
team.watchFor: Caicedo vs Germany's midfield in the group stage. If Caicedo wins the midfield battle, Ecuador can compete with anyone.
team.kcContext: Ecuador vs Curaçao is the most accessible Group E ticket in Kansas City — great value, historical occasion (Curaçao's debut), and Ecuador is a quality side.

kansascity.name: Curaçao

jersey.description: Royal blue with gold — home kit for Curaçao's historic World Cup debut. Away: yellow/turquoise/pink (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Ecuador — Jun 20, 7pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group E)

country.location: Small island in the southern Caribbean, 40 miles off the Venezuelan coast. Part of the Dutch Caribbean. One of the smallest nations ever to qualify for a World Cup. 2,200 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: Willemstad's colorful Dutch colonial harbor is a UNESCO World Heritage Site
Despite having 160,000 people, Curaçao has produced several Premier League and Bundesliga players
Curaçao officially became a separate country within the Kingdom of the Netherlands in 2010
The island has over 35 different nationalities living on it
Curaçao's coastline has some of the clearest water in the world — visibility up to 100 feet

team.lastWC: DEBUT — 2026 FIFA World Cup

starPlayers.name: Juriën Timber
starPlayers.note: The jewel of Curaçao football. Arsenal's first-choice defender. Elite ball-playing ability. World-class potential.

starPlayers.name: Myron Boadu
starPlayers.note: Ligue 1 striker of Dutch-Curaçaoan heritage. Clinical and powerful. Curaçao's most dangerous attacker.

starPlayers.name: Cuco Martina
starPlayers.note: Legendary veteran who pioneered the path for Curaçao players in European football.

team.style: Technical and brave. Many players in top European leagues. Attack-minded. Nothing to lose.
strengths: European club experience throughout the squad
weaknesses: Never been in a World Cup match before
Ecuador, Germany, Ivory Coast all significantly ranked higher
team.watchFor: The moment Curaçao takes the field in Kansas City for their first-ever World Cup match. A nation of 160,000 people on the biggest stage on earth.
team.kcContext: Curaçao vs Ecuador is one of the most historically significant matches in Kansas City — the smallest nation to ever play in a World Cup making their debut at Arrowhead.

kansascity.name: Tunisia

jersey.description: Strong red base with subtle geometric pattern across the fabric — sharp and modern (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Netherlands — Jun 25, 6pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group F)

country.location: Northernmost country in Africa, sitting at the crossroads of the Mediterranean. Bordered by Algeria and Libya. Across the sea from Italy and Sicily. 6,000 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: Tunisia was the first African and Arab country to ever play in a World Cup (1978)
The ruins of ancient Carthage — the rival of Rome — are a suburb of modern Tunis
Tunisia is Africa's northernmost country, with a Mediterranean coastline of 750 miles
The Tunisian medina (old city) of Tunis is a UNESCO World Heritage Site
George Lucas filmed Star Wars in Tunisia — Tatooine scenes were shot in the Saharan villages

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (beat France 1-0 in a dead rubber, eliminated on goal difference)

starPlayers.name: Hannibal Mejbri
starPlayers.note: Young, explosive, combative. Manchester United's midfielder brings Premier League energy to Tunisia.

starPlayers.name: Wahbi Khazri
starPlayers.note: The veteran leader who guided Tunisia in 2022. Brilliant vision, technical quality. Final World Cup appearance.

starPlayers.name: Dylan Bronn
starPlayers.note: Composed central defender. Organizes the backline and is key to Tunisia's defensive resilience.

team.style: Disciplined defensive shape. Direct and physical. Strong at set pieces. Counter-attack through wingers.
strengths: Beat France in 2022 (even in dead rubber)
weaknesses: Often exit at group stage despite competitive performances
Limited in true world-class forward talent
Netherlands is significantly stronger on paper
team.watchFor: Tunisia's defensive setup vs the Netherlands attack. Tunisia has historically made life very difficult for European favorites.
team.kcContext: Tunisia vs Netherlands is the most technically compelling Group F match at Kansas City. Dutch fans in force vs a Tunisian team with a point to prove.

kansascity.name: Netherlands

jersey.description: Boldest Dutch orange Nike has ever produced — lenticular crest shifts as players move (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Tunisia — Jun 25, 6pm CT, Kansas City Stadium (Group F)

country.location: Low-lying coastal nation in northwest Europe. Borders Belgium and Germany. 25% of its territory is below sea level — all reclaimed from the sea. 5,000 miles from Kansas City.
funFacts: 25% of the Netherlands is below sea level — the country built an entire system of dikes and pumps to reclaim it from the ocean
The Netherlands is the world's second-largest food exporter (after the USA)
Amsterdam has more bicycles than people — 880,000 bikes in a city of 820,000
Rembrandt and Vincent van Gogh are both Dutch
Dutch 'Total Football' revolutionized world football in the 1970s and still influences tactics today

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — Quarter-final (lost to Argentina on penalties)

starPlayers.name: Virgil van Dijk
starPlayers.note: Captain. One of the best defenders in football history. Physical, commanding, perfect on the ball. Leaders leaders.

starPlayers.name: Cody Gakpo
starPlayers.note: Scored 3 goals at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar. Powerful, left-footed, can play wide or central.

starPlayers.name: Xavi Simons
starPlayers.note: The most exciting young Dutch player of his generation. Technical, creative, direct. Future Ballon d'Or candidate.

team.style: Possession-based. High-press when needed. Van Dijk anchors a solid defense. Simons and Gakpo as the creativity.
strengths: Van Dijk — among the world's best defenders
Wide attacking threat through Gakpo and Simons
Netherlands vs Japan (2022 R16 rematch) makes Group F fascinating
weaknesses: Can struggle for consistency in knockout rounds
team.watchFor: The Netherlands' first match since their 2022 QF loss to Argentina. A motivated Dutch team in KC orange vs a stubborn Tunisia.
team.kcContext: Dutch fans travel in massive numbers to World Cups. Kansas City in orange on June 25 at 6pm CT will be a visual spectacle.

miami.name: Saudi Arabia

jersey.description: All-green with white trim — the Saudi national color dominant across the kit (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Uruguay — Jun 15, 6:00 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group H)

country.location: Kingdom occupying most of the Arabian Peninsula. Bordered by Jordan, Iraq, Kuwait, Qatar, UAE, Oman, Yemen. 7,500 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Saudi Arabia contains Mecca and Medina — the two holiest cities in Islam
The country holds about 17% of proven world oil reserves
Saudi Arabia shocked Argentina 2-1 at the 2022 World Cup — one of the greatest upsets in tournament history
The country only opened cinemas to the public in 2018 after a 35-year ban
Rub al Khali (Empty Quarter) is the largest continuous sand desert in the world

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (shocked Argentina in opening match)

starPlayers.name: Salem Al-Dawsari
starPlayers.note: The man who scored the 2022 winner vs Argentina. Saudi football icon. Thrives in big moments.

starPlayers.name: Mohammed Al-Owais
starPlayers.note: Arguably the best goalkeeper in Asia. Shot-stopping ability drastically exceeds Saudi ranking.

starPlayers.name: Sami Al-Najei
starPlayers.note: Engine of the Saudi midfield. High energy, disciplined positioning, sets the defensive foundation.

team.style: Organized low-block defense with explosive counter-attacks. Pace on the wings, resilient under pressure.
team.watchFor: Al-Dawsari on the counter. Saudi Arabia's best moment comes from soaking pressure and then breaking at pace. Uruguay cannot underestimate them.
team.cityContext: Saudi Arabia's opener vs Uruguay at Hard Rock is Miami's tournament kickoff. After 2022's shock of Argentina, this team knows how to deliver on big stages.

miami.name: Uruguay

jersey.description: Sky blue (celeste) — one of football's most iconic colors, worn since 1910 (Puma)

cityMatches: vs Saudi Arabia — Jun 15, 6:00 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group H)
vs Cape Verde — Jun 21, 6:00 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group H)

country.location: Sandwiched between Brazil and Argentina on the Atlantic coast of South America. Population smaller than Houston. 4,600 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Uruguay was the first country to host AND win the FIFA World Cup — 1930
Despite a population of 3.5 million, Uruguay has produced some of the greatest footballers in history
Uruguay legalised marijuana in 2013 — a global first
40% of Uruguay's electricity comes from renewable energy
Uruguay has more cattle than people — by a ratio of about 4 to 1

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in group stage on goal difference

starPlayers.name: Federico Valverde
starPlayers.note: The best midfielder in the world at his best. Box-to-box, elite engine, deadly long shots. Uruguay's heartbeat.

starPlayers.name: Darwin Núñez
starPlayers.note: Pure finishing instinct. Explosive pace, great in the air. When on song, unstoppable. Inconsistency is the only caveat.

starPlayers.name: Rodrigo Bentancur
starPlayers.note: Technical, composed, reads the game beautifully. Partners Valverde in one of the best international midfields.

team.style: Tactical flexibility under Bielsa. High press when fit, but always pragmatic. Built on defensive solidity and individual quality going forward.
weaknesses: Can be vulnerable to high press
team.watchFor: Valverde controlling the tempo vs Saudi Arabia and Cape Verde. If he dominates both matches, Uruguay should advance from Group H comfortably.
team.cityContext: Miami's large South American community will be split but vocal across both matches. Valverde and Núñez are household names for every football fan in the city.

miami.name: Cape Verde

jersey.description: Navy and red — the colors of the Cape Verdean flag represented on the pitch (Lacatoni)

cityMatches: vs Uruguay — Jun 21, 6:00 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group H)

country.location: Archipelago of 10 islands in the Atlantic Ocean, 350 miles off the west coast of Africa. 4,200 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Cape Verde has more citizens living abroad than at home — the diaspora outnumbers the island population
The islands were uninhabited before Portuguese sailors arrived in 1456
Cape Verde is one of Africa's most stable democracies — consistently ranked among Africa's freest nations
Cesária Évora, the "Barefoot Diva" of morna music, is Cape Verde's most famous cultural export
Despite the name, the islands are not actually green — they're mostly volcanic and arid

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Garry Rodrigues
starPlayers.note: The veteran who has carried Cape Verde's attack for years. Experienced, dangerous from wide positions.

starPlayers.name: Ryan Mendes
starPlayers.note: Technical and direct. One of Cape Verde's most creative players. Suited to the counter-attack style.

starPlayers.name: Adam Dianessy
starPlayers.note: Young striker who Cape Verde are building their attack around for the future.

team.style: Compact 4-4-2 defensive block. Hard to break down, play for set-pieces and counter-attacks. Every point is celebrated as a win.
team.watchFor: Can Cape Verde hold Uruguay? Their best result would be a draw that keeps Group H alive. The Blue Sharks have upset potential when fully organized.
team.cityContext: Cape Verde's small but passionate diaspora will be present at Hard Rock. This may be their most globally watched World Cup match yet — the islands are 600,000 people but dreaming big.

miami.name: Scotland

jersey.description: Dark navy blue — The Tartan Army's iconic color, worn with pride (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Brazil — Jun 24, 6:00 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group C)

country.location: Northern third of the island of Great Britain. Borders England to the south. Home to 800+ islands including the Hebrides and Shetland. 4,100 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Scotland invented golf, whisky (Scotch), the telephone (Alexander Graham Bell), and the television
The Tartan Army is widely considered the best-behaved traveling fan group in world football
Scotland's last World Cup was 1998 in France — a 28-year wait finally ended for 2026
The Loch Ness Monster has been Scotland's most famous resident since at least 565 AD
Scotland was the first country to play international football — their 1872 match vs England was the world's first

team.wcBestFinish: Group stage (8 appearances, never advanced beyond)
team.lastWC: 1998 France — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Andrew Robertson
starPlayers.note: One of the best left backs in the world. Sets the tempo with relentless energy and quality crossing.

starPlayers.name: Scott McTominay
starPlayers.note: Physical, powerful, goals from deep. Scotland's most important player — sets the tone in every match.

starPlayers.name: Lawrence Shankland
starPlayers.note: Scotland's clinical finishing threat. Knows where the goal is. The target man if McTominay plays deep.

team.style: Hard-working, organized, counter-attacking. McLean and McTominay protect the back four. Robertson pushes forward. Set-pieces are a genuine weapon.
strengths: Massive crowd support — Tartan Army travels everywhere
weaknesses: Historically can't convert performances into results
team.watchFor: McTominay vs Brazil's midfield. Scotland's best chance is winning the physical battle in the middle and hitting Brazil on the break.
team.cityContext: Scottish fans are legendary travelers — expect Hard Rock filled with kilts and tartan. Miami vs Scotland vs Brazil is the match of the group stage in the city.

miami.name: Brazil

jersey.description: Iconic Canarinha yellow — the most recognizable kit in world football (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Scotland — Jun 24, 6:00 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group C)

country.location: Largest country in South America and 5th largest in the world. 2,700 miles of Atlantic coastline. Amazon rainforest covers 60% of the country. 4,300 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Brazil is the only country to have played in every single FIFA World Cup since 1930
Brazil has more species of plants and freshwater fish than any other nation
São Paulo is the largest city in the Western Hemisphere with 22 million people
Brazil produces about 35% of the world's coffee
The Amazon River discharges more water into the ocean than the next 7 largest rivers combined

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in quarterfinals by Croatia on penalties

starPlayers.name: Vinícius Jr.
starPlayers.note: The best player in the world at his peak. Pace, skill, goals. If Brazil win the tournament, it's because of him.

starPlayers.name: Rodrygo
starPlayers.note: Champions League pedigree, brilliant in tight spaces. The foil to Vinícius and equally dangerous.

starPlayers.name: Endrick
starPlayers.note: Teenager who has already scored in El Clásico. Brazil's next generation striker — powerful, instinctive, fearless.

team.style: Attacking, fluid, technically brilliant. Four attacking players in the top half. Pressing from the front. Endless creativity.
team.watchFor: Vinícius Jr. at Hard Rock. Miami's enormous Brazilian community will create one of the loudest atmospheres in the tournament. Brazil needs a statement performance.
team.cityContext: Miami's Brazilian diaspora is one of the largest in the US. Brazil vs Scotland at Hard Rock will feel like a home match — expect deafening noise, dancing in the stands, and yellow everywhere.

miami.name: Colombia

jersey.description: Bright yellow with navy accents — Los Cafeteros' vibrant identity worn since the 1980s (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Portugal — Jun 27, 7:30 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group K)

country.location: Northwestern corner of South America, bordering Venezuela, Brazil, Peru, Ecuador, and Panama. Both Pacific and Caribbean coastlines. 1,900 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Colombia produces 90% of the world's emeralds
The national bird, the Andean condor, has a wingspan of up to 10 feet
Colombia is named after Christopher Columbus but he never set foot on its soil
Bogotá sits at 8,660 feet elevation — visitors often feel altitude effects on arrival
Colombia produces coffee at altitudes where the unique climate creates what many consider the world's finest beans

team.lastWC: 2018 Russia — Round of 16

starPlayers.name: Luis Díaz
starPlayers.note: One of the most exciting wide players in world football. Explosive, direct, goals and assists. Colombia's biggest star.

starPlayers.name: James Rodríguez
starPlayers.note: The 2014 Golden Boot winner. Still creative and dangerous when fit. The veteran playmaker Colombia's attack revolves around.

starPlayers.name: Richard Ríos
starPlayers.note: Emerging engine of the Colombian midfield. Physical, technical, helps Colombia control the ball.

team.style: Attacking fluency through Díaz and Ríos. James as the creative hub. Compact defensively but aggressive going forward.
strengths: Luis Díaz at his best is unstoppable
Tournament form — went deep in Copa América 2024
weaknesses: Group K has pressure from round one
team.watchFor: Díaz vs Portugal's defense. If Luis Díaz can get past Cancelo or the right back, Colombia can hurt Portugal's backline repeatedly.
team.cityContext: Miami has one of the largest Colombian communities in the US. Colombia vs Portugal — with Ronaldo on the other side — is one of the most anticipated matches at Hard Rock Stadium. The yellow sea will be extraordinary.

miami.name: Portugal

jersey.description: Green and red — the colors of the Portuguese flag split on the famous Selecção kit (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Colombia — Jun 27, 7:30 PM ET, Hard Rock Stadium (Group K)

country.location: Westernmost country in continental Europe. Atlantic coastline of 1,800 km. Portuguese is the 6th most spoken language in the world — spoken on 6 continents. 4,300 miles from Miami.
funFacts: Portugal is the oldest nation-state in Europe with largely unchanged borders since 1139
The Portuguese were the first Europeans to reach Japan, India, Brazil, and parts of Africa
Port wine was invented in Portugal — exported globally since the 1600s
Lisbon is built on seven hills, like Rome, and is one of the oldest cities in the world
Portuguese explorers introduced chili peppers to India — now a cornerstone of Indian cuisine

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in quarterfinals by Morocco

starPlayers.name: Cristiano Ronaldo
starPlayers.note: Arguably the greatest player ever. Still scoring at 41. His World Cup legacy will be defined here. Miami will be electric.

starPlayers.name: Bruno Fernandes
starPlayers.note: Portugal's creative spine. Passes, shoots, runs — the engine that makes the team click.

starPlayers.name: Rúben Dias
starPlayers.note: One of the best defenders in the world. Commands the backline with total authority.

team.style: High possession, technical buildup. Bruno drives the attack. Ronaldo as the elite finishing reference. Strong set-piece threat.
team.watchFor: Ronaldo at Hard Rock Stadium. One of the greatest players of all time, likely in his final World Cup, playing in front of Miami's massive Portuguese and Latin communities.
team.cityContext: Cristiano Ronaldo in Miami is one of the tournament's defining moments. The Colombian vs Portuguese communities will create one of Hard Rock's most electric atmospheres of the group stage.

newyork.name: Brazil

jersey.description: Iconic Canarinha yellow — the most recognizable kit in world football (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Morocco — Jun 13, 6:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group C)

country.location: Largest country in South America, 5th largest in the world. Amazon rainforest covers 60% of the country. 4,800 miles from New York.
funFacts: Brazil is the only country to have played in every FIFA World Cup since 1930
São Paulo is the largest city in the Western Hemisphere with 22 million people
Brazil produces about 35% of the world's coffee
The Amazon River discharges more water into the ocean than the next 7 largest rivers combined
Brazil has won the World Cup a record 5 times — more than any other nation

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in quarterfinals by Croatia on penalties

starPlayers.name: Vinícius Jr.
starPlayers.note: The best player in the world at his peak. Pace, skill, goals. If Brazil win the tournament, it's because of him.

starPlayers.name: Rodrygo
starPlayers.note: Champions League pedigree, brilliant in tight spaces. The foil to Vinícius and equally dangerous.

starPlayers.name: Endrick
starPlayers.note: Teenager who has already scored in El Clásico. Brazil's next generation — powerful, instinctive.

team.style: Attacking, fluid, technically brilliant. Four attacking players in the top half. Pressing from the front. Endless creativity.
weaknesses: Morocco is motivated opposition after 2022 run
team.watchFor: Vinícius Jr. vs Morocco's elite defense. Morocco held France and Portugal in 2022 — Brazil in New York will be one of the tournament's most anticipated group matches.
team.cityContext: Brazil's opening match at MetLife will be the loudest atmosphere in New Jersey's history. NYC's massive Brazilian diaspora, 82,500 seats, opening weekend energy. Don't miss this.

newyork.name: Morocco

jersey.description: Deep red with green trim — the Atlas Lions' powerful identity (Puma)

cityMatches: vs Brazil — Jun 13, 6:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group C)

country.location: Northwestern corner of Africa, bordering the Sahara to the south and the Strait of Gibraltar to the north. 3,600 miles from New York.
funFacts: Morocco reached the World Cup semifinal in 2022 — the first African or Arab nation ever to do so
The Sahara Desert covers about 92% of Morocco's land area south of the Atlas Mountains
Morocco is one of only three countries that border both the Atlantic Ocean and Mediterranean Sea
The city of Fez has the world's oldest continuously operating university, founded in 859 AD
Moroccan cooking is a blend of Arab, Amazigh, Andalusian, and sub-Saharan African influences

team.wcBestFinish: 4th place — 2022 Qatar (first African semi-finalist in history)
team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — 4th place

starPlayers.name: Achraf Hakimi
starPlayers.note: The best fullback in the world. Creates from wide, scores, never stops running. Morocco's engine.

starPlayers.name: Sofyan Amrabat
starPlayers.note: The defensive midfield destroyer who was the best midfielder of the 2022 World Cup. Controls everything.

starPlayers.name: Youssef En-Nesyri
starPlayers.note: Morocco's aerial threat and finisher. Scored in every knockout round in 2022. Big-game player.

team.style: Defensive solidity first. Compact lines, hard to break down. Then devastating on the counter through Hakimi. Set-pieces are a major weapon.
strengths: Hakimi's attacking output from right back
Belief — 2022 proved they can beat anyone
weaknesses: Limited in possession against elite pressing teams
Reliant on counter — if Brazil sits back, Morocco struggles
team.watchFor: Hakimi vs Brazil's left side. Morocco's attacks come through the right — Hakimi overlapping and cutting in. If he has space, Morocco can shock Brazil again.
team.cityContext: NYC's North African and Moroccan community is one of the largest in the US. Morocco at MetLife — a team that shocked the world in 2022 — against Brazil. This match will define Group C.

newyork.name: France

jersey.description: Deep navy with red accents — Les Bleus' iconic look that has won two World Cups (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Senegal — Jun 16, 3:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group I)

country.location: Western Europe, bordering Spain, Italy, Germany, Switzerland, Belgium, and Luxembourg. Atlantic and Mediterranean coastlines. 3,600 miles from New York.
funFacts: France is the most visited country in the world — over 90 million tourists per year
France has won more Nobel Peace Prizes per capita than any other country
The Louvre is the world's most visited art museum, holding the Mona Lisa
France produces over 1,600 different types of cheese
The French invented the metric system, cinema (Lumière brothers), and the bikini

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — runners-up (lost final to Argentina after epic comeback)

starPlayers.name: Kylian Mbappé
starPlayers.note: The best player in the world at 27. Scored a hat trick in the 2022 final. 2026 is his tournament to win or lose.

starPlayers.name: Antoine Griezmann
starPlayers.note: The technical engine behind Mbappé. Creates, scores, defends — the glue that holds France's system together.

starPlayers.name: Ousmane Dembélé
starPlayers.note: Electrifying and unpredictable. Terrifying to defend when at full pace. France's third attacking threat.

team.style: Counter-attacking at its finest. Elite pace up front with Mbappé and Dembélé. Griezmann connecting. World-class depth at every position.
strengths: Mbappé — arguably the best player at the tournament
team.watchFor: Mbappé vs Senegal's elite defense. France's opener at MetLife is their first group match — expect Deschamps to be cautious but Mbappé to deliver at least one moment of brilliance.
team.cityContext: France vs Senegal at MetLife is one of the most emotionally charged group matches of the tournament. NYC's massive Senegalese community vs Les Bleus. Colonial history, current superstardom, maximum stakes.

newyork.name: Senegal

jersey.description: Green and yellow — the colors of the Lions of Teranga (Puma)

cityMatches: vs France — Jun 16, 3:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group I)
vs Norway — Jun 22, 8:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group I)

country.location: Westernmost point of Africa on the Atlantic coast. Bordered by Mauritania, Mali, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, and The Gambia (which is surrounded by Senegal on three sides). 4,000 miles from New York.
funFacts: Senegal is known as the "Land of Teranga" — teranga means hospitality in Wolof
Dakar was the finishing point of the legendary Paris-Dakar rally for 30 years
Senegal is home to the "Pink Lake" (Lake Retba) — naturally colored pink by algae, with salt contents rivaling the Dead Sea
Wrestling (Laamb) is the most popular sport in Senegal — football is second
Senegal has never been at war with another country since independence in 1960

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — Round of 16

starPlayers.name: Sadio Mané
starPlayers.note: One of the most decorated African players ever. Champions League winner, African Ballon d'Or. Experience and quality at the top.

starPlayers.name: Kalidou Koulibaly
starPlayers.note: World-class defender. Physical, commanding, vocal leader. Senegal's defensive anchor.

starPlayers.name: Ismaïla Sarr
starPlayers.note: Explosive pace and directness. Senegal's primary attacking threat after Mané. Can run in behind any defense.

team.style: Direct and physical. Counter-attack through Mané and Sarr. Koulibaly anchors the defense. Pressing when energy is high.
weaknesses: France and Norway are difficult group draws
Can be exposed by elite technical teams
team.watchFor: Mané vs France's back four. Senegal's opener against Les Bleus is massive — and NYC's Senegalese community, one of the largest in the US, will be deafening at MetLife.
team.cityContext: The Senegalese community in New York City is among the largest in North America. Both France and Norway matches at MetLife will be emotionally charged. Expect Senegalese flags throughout the stadium.

newyork.name: Norway

jersey.description: Bold red — Norway's powerful national identity on the pitch (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Senegal — Jun 22, 8:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group I)

country.location: Western Scandinavian Peninsula in Northern Europe. 2,500 km of coastline with fjords. Arctic Circle runs through northern Norway. 3,900 miles from New York.
funFacts: Norway has the world's highest standard of living, consistently topping human development indices
Norway has more than 50,000 islands — the coast is so indented it would circle the Earth if straightened
The concept of "friluftsliv" (outdoor life) is central to Norwegian culture — spending time in nature is considered essential
Norway rejected EU membership in referendums in 1972 and 1994
Norwegian salmon farming produces 60% of the world's Atlantic salmon supply

team.lastWC: 1998 France — defeated Brazil in group stage, then lost in Round of 16

starPlayers.name: Erling Haaland
starPlayers.note: The most feared striker on the planet. First senior World Cup. His record-breaking scoring will be scrutinized like no other Norway player in history.

starPlayers.name: Martin Ødegaard
starPlayers.note: Technical, creative, composed. Norway's playmaker who makes Haaland's life much easier.

starPlayers.name: Alexander Sørloth
starPlayers.note: Physical, powerful second striker who pairs excellently with Haaland. Strong in the air, reliable finisher.

team.style: Direct through Haaland but technically capable via Ødegaard. High press when organized. Built to use Haaland's movement as the reference point for everything.
strengths: Haaland — the best striker in the world
Motivated first major tournament in 28 years
weaknesses: Team quality beyond Haaland and Ødegaard
Group I has France — elite opposition
First World Cup in nearly three decades — inexperience at this stage
team.watchFor: Haaland vs Senegal's center-backs. Can Haaland finally deliver at a World Cup? 82,500 people at MetLife will be watching. Group I could make or break Norway's tournament ambitions.
team.cityContext: Haaland's first World Cup match at MetLife is one of the tournament's defining moments. The whole world will be watching. NYC's Scandinavian community will be out in force.

newyork.name: Ecuador

jersey.description: Bright yellow with navy trim — La Tri's vibrant traditional identity (Marathon)

cityMatches: vs Germany — Jun 25, 4:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group E)

country.location: The equator runs through Ecuador — its name literally means equator. Pacific coast of South America, below Colombia and above Peru. 3,200 miles from New York.
funFacts: 'Ecuador' literally means equator in Spanish — it sits right on the line
The Galápagos Islands, where Darwin developed his theory of evolution, belong to Ecuador
Ecuador is the world's top exporter of bananas
Quito at 9,350 feet elevation is the second-highest capital city in the world
Ecuador uses the US Dollar as its official currency, adopted in 2000 after an economic crisis

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (4 points, narrowly eliminated)

starPlayers.name: Gonzalo Plata
starPlayers.note: Devastating pace and directness. Ecuador's most dangerous player in transition. Tough to contain.

starPlayers.name: Moisés Caicedo
starPlayers.note: One of the best defensive midfielders in the Premier League. Controls tempo, wins every duel.

starPlayers.name: Kendry Páez
starPlayers.note: Teenage sensation signed by Chelsea at 16. Technical, creative, the future of Ecuadorian football.

team.style: Physical and hard-working. Strong defensive foundation. Counter-attack through Plata and wingbacks.
weaknesses: Group E pressure from round one
team.watchFor: Caicedo vs Germany's midfield. Ecuador's group decider at MetLife will define their tournament. NYC's Ecuadorian community is enormous and will be loud.
team.cityContext: New York City has one of the largest Ecuadorian populations in the US — centered in Queens. Ecuador vs Germany at MetLife will feel electric for the Latino community in the city.

newyork.name: Germany

jersey.description: Classic white with black trim — Die Mannschaft's timeless identity worn at 4 World Cup triumphs (Adidas)

cityMatches: vs Ecuador — Jun 25, 4:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group E)

country.location: Heart of Central Europe, bordering 9 countries: France, Switzerland, Austria, Czech Republic, Poland, Denmark, Netherlands, Belgium, Luxembourg. 3,900 miles from New York.
funFacts: Germany has won the World Cup 4 times (1954, 1974, 1990, 2014) — most of any European nation
Germans drink an average of 106 liters of beer per person per year
Berlin has more bridges than Venice — over 1,700 crossing the city's waterways
Germany invented the printing press, the automobile, aspirin, and the MP3 format
Germany is Europe's largest economy and home to some of the world's most famous engineering brands

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in group stage (shocking exit)

starPlayers.name: Florian Wirtz
starPlayers.note: The most exciting young talent in Europe. Creative, powerful, scores and assists — Germany's next generational superstar.

starPlayers.name: Jamal Musiala
starPlayers.note: Technically brilliant, unpredictable with the ball. Partners Wirtz to form the most exciting midfield pair in the tournament.

starPlayers.name: Kai Havertz
starPlayers.note: Champions League winner. Versatile, technical, clinical when it matters. Germany's experienced attacking reference.

team.style: Attacking football rebuilt under Nagelsmann. Wirtz and Musiala free to create. High press, technical buildup, quality at every position.
strengths: World Cup winning DNA and experience
weaknesses: Ecuador with nothing to lose is dangerous
Pressure of expectation at every tournament
team.watchFor: Wirtz at MetLife. Germany's Group E decider vs Ecuador — with 82,500 watching — is exactly the big stage these young players were built for.
team.cityContext: New York has one of the largest German-American communities in the US. Germany vs Ecuador at MetLife — a Group E decider — is one of the most anticipated matches of the tournament's final group weekend.

newyork.name: Panama

jersey.description: Red and white — the colors of the Panamanian flag on Los Canaleros' kit (New Balance)

cityMatches: vs England — Jun 27, 5:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group L)

country.currency: Balboa (1:1 with USD) / US Dollar widely used
country.location: The narrow isthmus connecting North and South America. Panama Canal connects the Pacific and Atlantic Oceans. 2,300 miles from New York.
funFacts: The Panama Canal allows ships to travel between the Atlantic and Pacific in around 10 hours instead of weeks around South America
Panama was the first country outside the US to adopt the US Dollar as legal tender
Panama City is the only capital city in the Americas with a rainforest within its city limits
The Panama hat is actually from Ecuador — Panamanian merchants exported it, and the name stuck
Panama is the only place in the world where you can see the sun rise over the Pacific and set over the Atlantic from the same spot

team.lastWC: 2018 Russia — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Rolando Blackburn
starPlayers.note: Panama's top scorer and target man. Physical presence, hold-up play, creates space for others.

starPlayers.name: Adalberto Carrasquilla
starPlayers.note: Creative midfield link who makes Panama tick. Technical, composed under pressure.

starPlayers.name: César Yanis
starPlayers.note: Energy and dynamism in the midfield. Sets the tempo for Panama's press when organized.

team.style: Compact defensive block. Hard work and discipline. Counter-attack when the moment is right. Passionate, physical, organized.
team.watchFor: Can Panama keep England from scoring early? If they can stay in the match until the 60th minute, Group L gets interesting.
team.cityContext: New York's Latin American community includes thousands of Panamanians. England vs Panama at MetLife will be electric — with England fans descending on the city in enormous numbers.

newyork.name: England

jersey.description: Classic white — the Three Lions' home kit, worn at the one and only 1966 World Cup triumph (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Panama — Jun 27, 5:00 PM ET, MetLife Stadium (Group L)

country.location: Southern two-thirds of the island of Great Britain, plus many smaller islands. Separated from continental Europe by the English Channel (21 miles at its narrowest). 3,500 miles from New York.
funFacts: England invented the modern rules of football in 1863 — when the Football Association was founded in London
The Premier League is broadcast in 189 countries and watched by 3.2 billion people globally
England has the most successful club football history — 9 European Champions Cups, 6 UEFA Cups
London has more languages spoken within its boundaries than any other city in the world
The phrase "It's coming home" was first used in 1996 — and has haunted England ever since

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in quarterfinals by France

starPlayers.name: Jude Bellingham
starPlayers.note: The best young player in the world. Scores, creates, leads. England's tournament rests on his shoulders.

starPlayers.name: Harry Kane
starPlayers.note: World-class finishing, intelligent movement, best striker in England's history. Still seeking a major trophy.

starPlayers.name: Bukayo Saka
starPlayers.note: Consistent, direct, dangerous on either wing. One of the Premier League's best players for three straight seasons.

team.style: Structured, patient, direct when the opportunity arises. Bellingham connecting midfield to attack. Kane as the elite reference point.
strengths: Bellingham + Kane is the best attacking duo at the tournament
Premier League quality across the squad
weaknesses: Kane's trophy drought adds psychological weight
60 years since a major trophy — the weight of expectation
team.watchFor: Bellingham at MetLife. England fans will arrive in New York in the tens of thousands and create one of the most electric atmospheres at the stadium all tournament.
team.cityContext: England's traveling support descends on NYC in force — expect English pub culture to take over Midtown and Hell's Kitchen from the day before the match. MetLife will feel like Wembley when they score.

philly.name: Côte d'Ivoire

jersey.description: Orange, white, and green — the Éléphants wearing the Ivorian flag colors (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Ecuador — Jun 14, 7:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group E)
vs Curaçao — Jun 25, 4:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group E)

country.location: West Africa on the Gulf of Guinea, bordered by Ghana, Burkina Faso, Mali, Guinea, and Liberia. 4,500 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Côte d'Ivoire is the world's largest exporter of cocoa — responsible for about 40% of global supply
Abidjan is one of the fastest-growing cities in Africa, sometimes called 'the Paris of West Africa'
The Basilica of Our Lady of Peace in Yamoussoukro is the world's largest church by area
Côte d'Ivoire won back-to-back Africa Cup of Nations titles in 2015 and 2024
Didier Drogba remains the country's most celebrated sports figure — his 2005 appeal helped end a civil war

team.lastWC: 2014 Brazil — eliminated in group stage (group with Colombia)

starPlayers.name: Sébastien Haller
starPlayers.note: Champions League semi-finalist. Physical, technical, lethal in the box. Ivory Coast's finishing reference point.

starPlayers.name: Franck Kessié
starPlayers.note: Physical midfielder who drives from deep. Won the Serie A title with Milan. Sets the tempo for the entire team.

starPlayers.name: Simon Adingra
starPlayers.note: The future of Ivorian football. Fast, direct, unpredictable. Proved himself in the Premier League.

team.style: Physical and direct. Haller as the target man, wide players running in behind. Kessié protects and connects in midfield.
strengths: 2024 AFCON champions — the squad knows how to win
weaknesses: Ecuador and Germany are dangerous opposition
Group E has no easy games
Relies on fitness of aging stars
team.watchFor: Haller vs Ecuador's defense in the opener. Ivory Coast's group campaign starts at Lincoln Financial — a match that could set the tone for their entire tournament.
team.cityContext: Philly's West African community will make Lincoln Financial one of the most emotionally charged venues in the tournament. Côte d'Ivoire playing two group matches in Philadelphia is a historic occasion.

philly.name: Ecuador

jersey.description: Bright yellow with navy trim — La Tri's vibrant traditional identity (Marathon)

cityMatches: vs Côte d'Ivoire — Jun 14, 7:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group E)

country.location: The equator runs through Ecuador — its name literally means equator. Pacific coast of South America, between Colombia and Peru. 3,800 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: 'Ecuador' literally means equator in Spanish — it sits right on the line
The Galápagos Islands, where Darwin developed his theory of evolution, belong to Ecuador
Ecuador is the world's top exporter of bananas
Quito at 9,350 feet elevation is the second-highest capital city in the world
Ecuador uses the US Dollar as its official currency, adopted in 2000 after an economic crisis

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — group stage (4 points, narrowly eliminated)

starPlayers.name: Gonzalo Plata
starPlayers.note: Devastating pace and directness. Ecuador's most dangerous player in transition.

starPlayers.name: Moisés Caicedo
starPlayers.note: One of the best defensive midfielders in the Premier League. Controls tempo, wins every duel.

starPlayers.name: Kendry Páez
starPlayers.note: Teenage sensation signed by Chelsea at 16. The future of Ecuadorian football.

team.style: Physical and hard-working. Strong defensive foundation. Counter-attack through Plata and wingbacks.
team.watchFor: Caicedo vs Ivory Coast's midfield. Ecuador's Group E opener at Lincoln Financial — Caicedo's performance will set the tone for their entire tournament.
team.cityContext: Philadelphia's South American community will have a strong Ecuador contingent. Ivory Coast vs Ecuador is Philly's World Cup opener — both teams have everything to play for in Group E.

philly.name: Brazil

jersey.description: Iconic Canarinha yellow — the most recognizable kit in world football (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Haiti — Jun 19, 8:30 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group C)

country.location: Largest country in South America, 5th largest in the world. Amazon rainforest covers 60%. 4,700 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Brazil is the only country to have played in every FIFA World Cup since 1930
Brazil has won the World Cup a record 5 times — more than any other nation
São Paulo is the largest city in the Western Hemisphere with 22 million people
Brazil produces about 35% of the world's coffee
The Amazon River discharges more water into the ocean than the next 7 largest rivers combined

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in quarterfinals by Croatia on penalties

starPlayers.name: Vinícius Jr.
starPlayers.note: The best player in the world at his peak. Pace, skill, goals. If Brazil win the tournament, it's because of him.

starPlayers.name: Rodrygo
starPlayers.note: Champions League pedigree, brilliant in tight spaces. The foil to Vinícius and equally dangerous.

starPlayers.name: Endrick
starPlayers.note: Teenager who has already scored in El Clásico. Brazil's next generation — powerful, instinctive.

team.style: Attacking, fluid, technically brilliant. Four attacking players in the top half. Pressing from the front.
weaknesses: Haiti will play for the occasion
team.watchFor: Vinícius Jr. at Lincoln Financial. Brazil vs Haiti will become one of the most emotionally charged matches in Philly's tournament — the city's Haitian community will create an extraordinary atmosphere.
team.cityContext: Philadelphia's Haitian community is one of the most passionate in North America. Brazil vs Haiti at Lincoln Financial will be electric — expect Haitian flags, drumming, and Brazil gold everywhere. Philly's defining World Cup night.

philly.name: Haiti

jersey.description: Blue and red — the colors of the Haitian flag on Les Grenadiers' kit (Macron)

cityMatches: vs Brazil — Jun 19, 8:30 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group C)

country.location: Western third of the island of Hispaniola in the Caribbean, sharing with the Dominican Republic. 1,600 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Haiti was the first Black republic in the world and the first Caribbean country to gain independence (1804)
The Haitian Revolution is the only successful slave revolt in history to found a nation
Haiti's revolution inspired slave rebellions across the Americas and changed the course of history
Haiti has one of the oldest and richest Vodou traditions in the Caribbean
Philadelphia has one of the largest Haitian diaspora communities in the United States

team.lastWC: 1974 West Germany — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Duckens Nazon
starPlayers.note: Haiti's most experienced attacker. Physical, direct, knows how to hold the ball up under pressure.

starPlayers.name: Steeven Saba
starPlayers.note: Pacy winger who can create danger on the counter-attack. Haiti's primary transition threat.

starPlayers.name: Frantzdy Pierrot
starPlayers.note: Energetic midfielder who works tirelessly. Sets the defensive foundation and links play for Haiti.

team.style: Defensive block, organized, hard to break down. Counter-attack through pace up front. Set pieces offer their best scoring opportunities.
strengths: Philadelphia's Haitian community as their 12th man
weaknesses: Brazil is the strongest opposition in the group
First World Cup in 52 years — rusty at this level
team.watchFor: Can Haiti hold Brazil for any significant period? Every minute they stay level will be celebrated like a goal. Lincoln Financial will be one of the most emotionally charged venues of the entire tournament.
team.cityContext: Haiti vs Brazil at Lincoln Financial is Philly's most emotionally significant World Cup match. The city's Haitian community — one of America's largest — will turn Lincoln Financial into a cauldron. This is their moment on the world stage.

philly.name: France

jersey.description: Deep navy with red accents — Les Bleus' iconic look that has won two World Cups (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Iraq — Jun 22, 5:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group I)

country.location: Western Europe, bordering Spain, Italy, Germany, Switzerland, Belgium, and Luxembourg. 3,700 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: France is the most visited country in the world — over 90 million tourists per year
The Louvre is the world's most visited art museum, holding the Mona Lisa
France produces over 1,600 different types of cheese
France has won the World Cup twice — 1998 at home, 2018 in Russia
The French invented cinema (Lumière brothers) and the metric system

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — runners-up (lost final to Argentina)

starPlayers.name: Kylian Mbappé
starPlayers.note: The best player in the world at 27. Scored a hat trick in the 2022 final. 2026 is his tournament to win or lose.

starPlayers.name: Antoine Griezmann
starPlayers.note: Creative, scores, defends — the glue that holds France's system together.

starPlayers.name: Ousmane Dembélé
starPlayers.note: Electrifying and unpredictable. Terrifying to defend when at full pace.

team.style: Counter-attacking at its finest. Elite pace up front. World-class depth at every position.
strengths: Mbappé — arguably the best player at the tournament
team.watchFor: Mbappé at Lincoln Financial. France vs Iraq is expected to be a statement win — but how dominant Les Bleus are here will signal their tournament intentions.
team.cityContext: France's Group I match at Lincoln Financial brings one of the tournament's biggest teams to South Philly. Expect French traveling fans to fill the bars of Old City and Rittenhouse before kickoff.

philly.name: Iraq

jersey.description: Red and black — the colors of Iraq's national identity on the kit (Joma)

cityMatches: vs France — Jun 22, 5:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group I)

country.location: Heart of the Middle East, between the Tigris and Euphrates rivers — the ancient land of Mesopotamia. Bordered by Iran, Turkey, Syria, Jordan, Kuwait, and Saudi Arabia. 6,200 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Iraq is home to the world's earliest writing system — cuneiform script, developed 5,000 years ago
The Tigris and Euphrates rivers that run through Iraq are from the Bible's Garden of Eden account
Iraq has the world's 4th largest oil reserves
The city of Baghdad was once the world's largest and most advanced city during the Islamic Golden Age
Iraq's national football team has won the AFC Asian Cup — showing real competitive quality in Asian football

team.lastWC: 1986 Mexico — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Mohanad Ali
starPlayers.note: Iraq's most prolific domestic scorer. Experienced, knows the game, brings leadership to the attack.

starPlayers.name: Bashar Resan
starPlayers.note: Technical midfielder who controls the pace of Iraq's play. Their most consistent performer.

starPlayers.name: Amjed Attwan
starPlayers.note: Experienced goalkeeper who has kept Iraq competitive in Asian qualifiers. Shot-stopping is his strength.

team.style: Organized defensive block, looking to frustrate and counter. Very limited chance of scoring vs France, but discipline could keep the margin manageable.
strengths: First World Cup in 40 years — playing for history
weaknesses: France is the toughest possible Group I draw
Limited exposure to top European football
team.watchFor: How many does France score? Iraq's defensive organization will be tested from minute one. Every save Attwan makes and every good defensive moment will be celebrated by the traveling Iraqi support.
team.cityContext: The Iraqi-American community in the Mid-Atlantic region will have representation at Lincoln Financial. For many fans, this is Iraq's first World Cup in their lifetime. The occasion itself is the victory.

philly.name: Curaçao

jersey.description: Blue and gold — inspired by the Netherlands heritage and Curaçao's island identity (Joma)

cityMatches: vs Côte d'Ivoire — Jun 25, 4:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group E)

country.location: Island in the southern Caribbean Sea, just north of Venezuela. Part of the ABC Islands of the Dutch Caribbean. 2,100 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Curaçao — a population of 160,000 — is the smallest nation to qualify for the 2026 World Cup
The island produces the famous Curaçao liqueur — the blue version is exported worldwide
Willemstad's colorful colonial waterfront is a UNESCO World Heritage Site
Football in Curaçao exploded after the Dutch Antilles reformed — the island punches far above its weight
Curaçao is one of only a few places where the oil refinery has been a bigger industry than tourism — though tourism is growing fast

team.lastWC: First World Cup appearance

starPlayers.name: Cuco Martina
starPlayers.note: Veteran captain who has been the backbone of Curaçao's rise. Experienced, organized, leads by example.

starPlayers.name: Leandro Bacuna
starPlayers.note: Quality midfielder who has played in the English Championship. Technical and experienced at the professional level.

starPlayers.name: Juniordinho
starPlayers.note: Exciting young forward who could be Curaçao's breakout star. Pace and directness on the counter.

team.style: Defensive organization, hard work, counter-attack. An island of 160,000 people with a football identity that belies its size.
strengths: Pride of representing a tiny nation on the biggest stage
Group E match at Philly is their tournament highlight
weaknesses: Global exposure far less than every opponent
team.watchFor: Can Curaçao score against Ivory Coast? Any goal at Lincoln Financial would be the biggest moment in Curaçaoan sporting history. An island of 160,000 watching their team at the World Cup.
team.cityContext: Curaçao makes history at Lincoln Financial — their first World Cup match ever. Philadelphia's Caribbean community will be well represented. Cheer for the little guy: 160,000 people and a World Cup dream.

philly.name: Croatia

jersey.description: Red and white checkerboard — the Vatreni's iconic Šahovnica kit, one of the most recognized in football (Nike)

cityMatches: vs Ghana — Jun 27, 5:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group L)

country.location: Eastern Adriatic coast of Europe. Famous 1,778 km coastline with over 1,000 islands. Bordered by Slovenia, Hungary, Serbia, Bosnia-Herzegovina, and Montenegro. 4,400 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Croatia won silver at the 2018 World Cup and bronze in 2022 — extraordinary for a nation of 3.9 million
The tie was invented in Croatia — it originated in Croat soldiers' scarves during the 30 Years War
Dubrovnik's Old Town, a UNESCO site, was used as the filming location for King's Landing in Game of Thrones
Croatia has 10 UNESCO World Heritage Sites and 8 national parks
Croatia's coastline has more islands than any other country in the Mediterranean

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — 3rd place

starPlayers.name: Luka Modrić
starPlayers.note: Ballon d'Or winner, arguably the greatest midfielder of his generation. 39 years old and still leading Croatia. Legacy match.

starPlayers.name: Joško Gvardiol
starPlayers.note: The best young defender in the world. Manchester City regular. Dominant, assured, commands the backline.

starPlayers.name: Mateo Kovačić
starPlayers.note: Technical, composed, Champions League winner. Provides the quality link between defense and attack.

team.style: Possession and patience. Modrić orchestrates. Gvardiol provides the attacking outlet from defense. Organized, difficult to beat.
strengths: Modrić — tournament pedigree like no other
weaknesses: Physical demands of Group L schedule
team.watchFor: Modrić's final World Cup? At 39, watching Luka Modrić control the midfield at Lincoln Financial could be one of football's last great farewells. Croatia vs Ghana in Philly is a serious Group L match.
team.cityContext: South Philadelphia's Croatian community will make Lincoln Financial feel special. Croatia — a nation of 3.9 million that reached a World Cup final — brings elite football culture to Philly's Group L decider.

philly.name: Ghana

jersey.description: Green and gold — the Black Stars' vibrant Pan-African identity on the pitch (Puma)

cityMatches: vs Croatia — Jun 27, 5:00 PM ET, Lincoln Financial Field (Group L)

country.location: West Africa on the Gulf of Guinea, bordered by Côte d'Ivoire, Burkina Faso, and Togo. The Prime Meridian passes through Ghana. 5,100 miles from Philadelphia.
funFacts: Ghana was the first sub-Saharan African country to gain independence (1957) and became a symbol of Pan-Africanism
Ghana's name comes from the ancient Ghana Empire, though the current country is in a different location
Ghana is the world's second-largest cocoa producer and a major gold exporter — two of the richest commodities on earth
Ghanaian football was the first to produce consistent Premier League talent — from Abedi Pelé to Michael Essien to Thomas Partey
The most heartbreaking moment in African football history: Luis Suárez's handball in 2010 stopped Ghana from becoming Africa's first World Cup semi-finalist

team.lastWC: 2022 Qatar — eliminated in group stage

starPlayers.name: Mohammed Kudus
starPlayers.note: One of the most exciting midfielders in the Premier League. Creative, dangerous, scores and assists consistently.

starPlayers.name: Iñaki Williams
starPlayers.note: Physical, relentless, hard to contain. Williams chose Ghana over Spain — and his passion for the Black Stars is undeniable.

starPlayers.name: Thomas Partey
starPlayers.note: Experienced, powerful, controls the defensive midfield. Partey's form sets Ghana's defensive foundation.

team.style: Direct and physical. Kudus creating in the final third, Williams as the physical threat up front. Partey protecting behind.
weaknesses: Croatia is experienced World Cup opposition
Qualifying pressure vs top African nations
team.watchFor: Kudus vs Modrić. The biggest creative battle in Group L. Ghana vs Croatia is a repeat of their 2022 group stage match (Croatia won 2-0). Can Ghana reverse the result in Philly?
team.cityContext: Philadelphia's West African community will be well represented for Ghana vs Croatia. The Black Stars' 2010 heartbreak story resonates globally — Philly will know what it means when Ghana score.
